canonical_filename.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required inside skill directory

custom_filename.mechanism: Variable directory name: .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md — directory name is the skill identifier

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (recommended, not required; if omitted uses first paragraph of markdown content)

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: disable-model-invocation (optional bool, default false); also prevents the skill from being preloaded into subagents via the skills frontmatter field

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (optional, falls back to directory name; lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, max 64 characters)

shared_scope.mechanism: Managed settings deployment for organization-wide distribution

user_invocable.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: user-invocable (optional bool, default true); controls /menu visibility only, not Skill tool access

providerExtensions.name: Supporting Files
providerExtensions.summary: Bundle templates, scripts, and reference docs alongside SKILL.md; loaded on demand via ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}.

examples.code: # No YAML field; this is a filesystem convention
examples.note: Supporting files live in the skill directory alongside SKILL.md.

providerExtensions.name: Description-Based Auto-Invocation
providerExtensions.summary: Claude auto-invokes skills whose description matches the conversation; opt out via disable-model-invocation: true.

providerExtensions.name: Argument Hint
providerExtensions.summary: Shows expected argument format during autocomplete (purely presentational).

providerExtensions.name: Allowed Tools Pre-Approval
providerExtensions.summary: Pre-approves tool calls while the skill is active; does not restrict tool availability. Accepts space-separated string or YAML list. For project skills, takes effect after workspace trust dialog is accepted.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Model Override
providerExtensions.summary: Overrides the session model for the current turn while this skill is active; session model resumes on next prompt. Accepts same values as /model or 'inherit'.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Effort Level
providerExtensions.summary: Overrides the session effort level (low/medium/high/xhigh/max) while the skill is active.

providerExtensions.name: Subagent Execution via context fork
providerExtensions.summary: Runs the skill in an isolated subagent with no conversation history when set to fork; companion agent field selects the subagent type (e.g., Explore, Plan).

providerExtensions.name: Skill-Scoped Lifecycle Hooks
providerExtensions.summary: Attaches lifecycle hooks that fire only while this skill is active; supports once: true flag on individual handlers (honored only in skill frontmatter, not settings files).

providerExtensions.name: Path-Based Activation Filter
providerExtensions.summary: Limits auto-activation to file glob matches; accepts comma-separated string or YAML list; explicit /skill-name invocation remains unrestricted.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Shell Selection
providerExtensions.summary: Selects bash (default) or powershell for inline command execution blocks within the skill. Requires CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1 for powershell.

providerExtensions.name: Argument and Session Variable Substitution
providerExtensions.summary: Skills support $ARGUMENTS (all args), $ARGUMENTS[N] (0-based index), $N (shorthand for $ARGUMENTS[N]), $name (named argument from arguments frontmatter), ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}, ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}, and ${CLAUDE_EFFORT} string substitutions. Named arguments declared as space-separated string or YAML list in arguments frontmatter map to positions in order.

providerExtensions.name: Shell Command Injection for Dynamic Context
providerExtensions.summary: Inline !`command` and ```! fenced blocks execute shell commands and inject output before Claude sees the prompt.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Content Lifecycle and Compaction Behavior
providerExtensions.summary: Skill content enters context once per invocation and stays for the session. Auto-compaction re-attaches the most recent invocation of each skill (first 5,000 tokens each) within a 25,000-token combined budget, filling from most-recently-invoked first.

providerExtensions.name: Nested Directory Auto-Discovery
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code automatically discovers skills from .claude/skills/ directories along the path to edited files (monorepo support).

providerExtensions.name: Additional Directory Skills Loading with Live Reload
providerExtensions.summary: Skills in --add-dir directories are loaded with live change detection (other .claude/ configuration is not loaded from added directories).

providerExtensions.name: Plugin Scope
providerExtensions.summary: Plugin-bundled skills use a plugin-name:skill-name namespace separate from enterprise/personal/project priority ordering.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Permission Rules
providerExtensions.summary: Skill, Skill(name), and Skill(name *) permission rules restrict which skills Claude may invoke programmatically. A few built-in commands (/init, /review, /security-review) are also available through the Skill tool.

providerExtensions.name: Organization Policy to Disable Shell Execution in Skills
providerExtensions.summary: Disables inline shell command injection for user/project/plugin/added-directory skills; each command replaced with '[shell command execution disabled by policy]'. Bundled and managed skills are not affected.

providerExtensions.name: Bundled Skills
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code ships built-in prompt-based skills (/simplify, /batch, /debug, /loop, /claude-api, /fewer-permission-prompts) immune to the shell-execution policy.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Description Context Budget
providerExtensions.summary: Skill descriptions share a dynamic budget (1% of context, 8,000 char fallback) with a 1,536-character per-entry cap (combined description + when_to_use text), raisable via SLASH_COMMAND_TOOL_CHAR_BUDGET. Individual skills can be set to name-only in skillOverrides to free budget.

providerExtensions.name: Agent Skills Open Standard Compliance
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code skills follow the Agent Skills open standard (agentskills.io) with CC-specific extensions layered on top.

providerExtensions.name: When-to-Use Context Field
providerExtensions.summary: Additional context for when Claude should invoke the skill, such as trigger phrases or example requests. Appended to description in the skill listing and counts toward the 1,536-character cap.

providerExtensions.name: Named Positional Arguments via arguments Frontmatter
providerExtensions.summary: Named positional arguments for $name substitution in skill content. Declared as a space-separated string or YAML list in the arguments frontmatter field; names map to argument positions in order.

providerExtensions.name: skillOverrides Setting for External Visibility Control
providerExtensions.summary: The skillOverrides setting in settings.json controls skill visibility without editing SKILL.md. States: 'on' (name+description in context, in /menu), 'name-only' (name only in context, in /menu), 'user-invocable-only' (hidden from Claude, in /menu), 'off' (hidden from both). The /skills menu writes this setting interactively. Plugin skills are not affected.

providerExtensions.name: Live Change Detection for Skill Directories
providerExtensions.summary: Adding, editing, or removing a skill file takes effect within the current session without restarting. Creating a top-level skills directory that did not exist at session start requires a restart.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Subagent Type Selection
providerExtensions.summary: The agent frontmatter field selects which subagent type executes the skill when context: fork is set (e.g., 'Explore', 'Plan').
